expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((EXCHANGE_STRT_DATE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(EXCHANGE_STRT_DATE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN (MAKE_DATE_TIME(9999, 12, 31, 23, 59, 59, 0)) ELSE EXCHANGE_STRT_DATE END)
(CASE WHEN ((SCHEMA_VERSION IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(SCHEMA_VERSION)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE SCHEMA_VERSION END)
(CASE WHEN ((EXCHANGE_REFERENCE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(EXCHANGE_REFERENCE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE EXCHANGE_REFERENCE END)
(CASE WHEN ((MESSAGE_TS IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(MESSAGE_TS)))) AS string) = '')) THEN (MAKE_DATE_TIME(9999, 12, 31, 23, 59, 59, 0)) ELSE MESSAGE_TS END)
(CASE WHEN ((MESSAGE_STATUS_CODE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(MESSAGE_STATUS_CODE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE UPPER(MESSAGE_STATUS_CODE) END)

(CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTRING(MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 1, ((LOCATE('_', MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 0)) - 1)) AS string) = 'INBOUND') THEN (CASE WHEN CAST((INBOUND_MESSAGE_TYPE_CODE IS NULL) AS BOOLEAN) THEN '-' ELSE INBOUND_MESSAGE_TYPE_CODE END) WHEN CAST((OUTBOUND_MESSAGE_TYPE_CODE IS NULL) AS BOOLEAN) THEN '-' ELSE OUTBOUND_MESSAGE_TYPE_CODE END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTRING(MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 1, ((LOCATE('_', MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 0)) - 1)) AS string) = 'INBOUND') THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END)
(CASE WHEN ((MESSAGE_PACKET_DOC_TYPE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(MESSAGE_PACKET_DOC_TYPE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE MESSAGE_PACKET_DOC_TYPE END)
(CASE WHEN ((EXCHANGE_STRT_DATE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(EXCHANGE_STRT_DATE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN (MAKE_DATE_TIME(9999, 12, 31, 23, 59, 59, 0)) ELSE EXCHANGE_STRT_DATE END)
(CASE WHEN ((SCHEMA_VERSION IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(SCHEMA_VERSION)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE SCHEMA_VERSION END)
(CASE WHEN ((EXCHANGE_REFERENCE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(EXCHANGE_REFERENCE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE EXCHANGE_REFERENCE END)
(CASE WHEN ((IN_MESSAGE_TS IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(IN_MESSAGE_TS)))) AS string) = '')) THEN (MAKE_DATE_TIME(9999, 12, 31, 23, 59, 59, 0)) ELSE IN_MESSAGE_TS END)
(CASE WHEN ((MESSAGE_STATUS_CODE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(MESSAGE_STATUS_CODE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE UPPER(MESSAGE_STATUS_CODE) END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTRING(MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 1, ((LOCATE('_', MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 0)) - 1)) AS string) = 'POST_RS') THEN RS_MESSAGE_TYPE_CODE ELSE RQ_MESSAGE_TYPE_CODE END)
(CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTRING(MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 1, ((LOCATE('_', MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION, 0)) - 1)) AS string) = 'INBOUND') THEN 'IN' ELSE 'OUT' END)
(CASE WHEN ((MESSAGE_PACKET_DOC_TYPE IS NULL) OR (CAST((RTRIM((LTRIM(MESSAGE_PACKET_DOC_TYPE)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE MESSAGE_PACKET_DOC_TYPE END)

properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: DataFrame) -> DataFrame:
properties.script:

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION = 'INBOUND_POST_RQ') THEN IN_RQ_CONVERSATION_NUM WHEN CAST((MESSAGE_TYPE_DIRECTION IN ('INBOUND_POST_RS', 'OUTBOUND_POST_RS')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN IN_RS_CONVERSATION_NUM ELSE OUT_RQ_CONVERSATION_NUM END)
